name: Bash
description: Execute a shell command. Supports foreground and background execution. Background commands return a task ID that can be monitored with TaskOutput.

description.description: Short human-readable description of what the command does.

run_in_background.description: If true, runs the command in the background and returns a task ID.

dangerouslyDisableSandbox.description: Override sandbox mode. Use only when explicitly required.

name: Read
description: Read a file from the local filesystem. Supports text files, images (PNG/JPG), PDFs (up to 20 pages at a time), and Jupyter notebooks (.ipynb).

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-indexed).

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read.

pages.description: Page range for PDFs (e.g. '1-5', '3'). Max 20 pages per call.

name: Write
description: Write or overwrite a file. Must Read the file first if it already exists. Prefer Edit for modifying existing files.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to write.

content.description: Full content to write to the file.

name: Edit
description: Perform an exact string replacement in an existing file. old_string must be unique in the file or replace_all must be set. Must Read the file before editing.

old_string.description: Exact string to replace. Must be unique in the file (or use replace_all).

replace_all.description: Replace all occurrences of old_string. Default false.

name: Glob
description: Fast file pattern matching. Returns matching file paths sorted by modification time.

path.description: Directory to search in. Defaults to current working directory.

name: Grep
description: Search file contents using ripgrep. Supports full regex, file type filters, context lines, and multiple output modes.

path.description: File or directory to search in. Defaults to current working directory.

type.description: File type filter (e.g. 'js', 'py', 'rust'). Maps to rg --type.

context.description: Lines of context before and after each match.

head_limit.description: Limit output to first N results. Default 250.

multiline.description: Enable multiline matching (. matches newlines). Default false.

name: Agent
description: Launch a specialized sub-agent to handle complex multi-step tasks autonomously. Can run in foreground or background. Supports isolated git worktrees.

description.description: Short (3-5 word) description of the task.

prompt.description: Full task description for the agent.

run_in_background.description: Run agent in background. Will notify on completion.

isolation.description: 'worktree' to run in an isolated git worktree.

name: TaskCreate
description: Create a tracked task item for multi-step work. Displays in the session task UI.

description.description: Full description of the task goal and approach.

name: TaskUpdate
description: Update the status or content of an existing tracked task.

taskId.description: ID of the task to update (integer as string).

addBlocks.description: Task IDs that this task now blocks.

addBlockedBy.description: Task IDs that block this task.

name: TaskGet
description: Get the current state of a specific task by ID.

name: TaskList
description: List all tasks in the current session with their statuses.

name: TaskOutput
description: Retrieve the output of a running or completed background task.

name: TaskStop
description: Stop a running background task.

taskId.description: ID of the background task to stop.

name: ToolSearch
description: Fetch full schema definitions for deferred tools by name or keyword query. Required before calling a deferred tool.

query.description: Tool name(s) or keyword query. Use 'select:Read,Edit' for exact names.

name: WebFetch
description: Fetch content from a URL. Returns the page content as text.

name: WebSearch
description: Perform a web search and return results.

name: NotebookEdit
description: Edit cells in a Jupyter notebook (.ipynb file).

new_source.description: New source content for the cell.

name: LSP
description: Query the Language Server Protocol for code intelligence: hover info, go-to-definition, references, diagnostics.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the source file.

name: Skill
description: Invoke a user-defined skill (slash command). Expands the skill into a full prompt and executes it.

skill.description: Skill name (e.g. 'commit', 'review-pr', 'simplify'). Use fully-qualified 'namespace:skill' if needed.

args.description: Optional arguments to pass to the skill.

name: EnterPlanMode
description: Enter plan mode. Claude describes its planned actions and waits for user approval before executing.

reason.description: Why plan mode is being entered.

name: ExitPlanMode
description: Exit plan mode and begin executing the approved plan.

name: EnterWorktree
description: Enter an isolated git worktree for safe, isolated work on a branch.

name: ExitWorktree
description: Exit the current git worktree and return to the main working directory.

name: CronCreate
description: Create a scheduled cron trigger that runs a remote agent on a schedule.

prompt.description: Prompt for the agent to run on schedule.

description.description: Human-readable description of the scheduled task.

name: CronList
description: List all active scheduled cron triggers.

name: CronDelete
description: Delete a scheduled cron trigger by ID.

id.description: ID of the cron trigger to delete.

name: RemoteTrigger
description: Manually trigger a remote agent to run immediately.

id.description: ID of the trigger to fire.
